zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joanne Phillippes於1578年8月4日出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Lord William Phillips Earl19歲，母親Margaret Bartlett12歲。她於1626年4月25日與Sir Richard Harrope在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1626年住在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利。她去世於1645年1月30日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬布爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joanne Phillippes于1578年8月4日出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Lord William Phillips Earl19岁，母亲Margaret Bartlett12岁。她于1626年4月25日与Sir Richard Harrope在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1626年住在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利。她去世于1645年1月30日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬布爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Phillippes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Philippe   (see   Philip  ). This form of the surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Philippe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Ghislaine, Alain, Andre, Camille, Dieuseul, Emile, Francois, Guerda, Henri, Jean Robert, Jean-Pierre.

Breton, French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from the French personal name Philippe (see Philip ). In France, this surname is most common in Brittany. It is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
History: Jean Philippe dit Beaulieu from Gruchet-le-Valasse in Seine-Maritime, France, married Catherine Galarneau in Charlesbourg, QC, in 1685.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joanne Phillippes was born on 4 August 1578, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord William Phillips Earl, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Bartlett, was 12. She married Sir Richard Harrope on 25 April 1626, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She lived in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1626. She died on 30 January 1645, in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joanne Phillippes est née le 4 août 1578, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord William Phillips Earl, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bartlett, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Harrope le 25 avril 1626, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1626. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1645, à Mamble, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joanne Phillippes am 4. August 1578 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William Phillips Earl 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bartlett 12. Sie hat am 25. April 1626 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Harrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1626 hat sie in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1645 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanne Phillippes è nata il il 4 agosto 1578 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord William Phillips Earl, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bartlett, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Harrope il 25 aprile 1626, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1626. Morì il 30 gennaio 1645, nel Mamble, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joanne Phillippesが1578年8月4日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord William Phillips Earlは19歳，母Margaret Bartlettは12歳であった。1626年4月25日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでSir Richard Harropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1626年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーに住んでいた。彼女は1645年1月30日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマンブルで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joanne Phillippes(이)가 1578년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Phillips Earl(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bartlett(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1626년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 Sir Richard Harrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1626년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 살았다. 그녀는 1645년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 맘블일에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.4 Aug 1578–30 Jan 1645: 4 de agosto de 1578–30 de janeiro de 1645
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanne Phillippes nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1578, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord William Phillips Earl, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bartlett, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Harrope em 25 de abril de 1626, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1626. Ela faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1645, em Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joanne Phillippes родилась 4 августа 1578 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord William Phillips Earl было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bartlett, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Harrope 25 апреля 1626 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1626 году. Она умерла 30 января 1645 г. в местности мамбл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.4 Aug 1578–30 Jan 1645: 4 de agosto de 1578–30 de enero de 1645
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joanne Phillippes nació el 4 de agosto de 1578, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord William Phillips Earl, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Bartlett, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Harrope el 25 de abril de 1626, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Vivió en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1626. Murió el 30 de enero de 1645, en Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
